overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a rain-soaked tribal coastal settlement built on wooden stilts and walkways. The character navigates through the village passing by NPCs, large wooden structures, and scenic coastal views before ascending through a covered passage to the upper settlement tiers.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village entrance with large wooden wheel structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked tribal village entrance carrying a bow on her back

notable_agents.action: tribal villager standing near wooden structure observing the surroundings

entered.detail: massive wooden water wheel structure made of logs and ropes dominating the left side
colorful painted wooden spikes lining the path with red and blue tips
tall carved wooden totem with tribal markings and decorations
misty mountains visible in the background through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking through the entrance of a tribal settlement during a light rain shower. Large wooden structures including a massive water wheel and carved totems frame the path, while colorful spiked barriers line the wooden walkway. A tribal NPC stands observing near the right side as the character moves forward through the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal boardwalk with turquoise ocean views

events.description: exits the village interior onto an open coastal boardwalk with crashing waves visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden boardwalk overlooking the turbulent turquoise ocean and crashing waves

entered.detail: vibrant turquoise water with white foam crashing against coastal rocks
rock formations emerging from the ocean with waves breaking around them

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open coastal boardwalk where the wooden path runs alongside a vibrant turquoise ocean. Waves crash against the rocks below as rain continues to fall, and the large wooden structures of the village entrance fade behind. The mountains shift to the left side of the frame as the camera follows the coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower village area with thatched huts and tribal inhabitants

events.description: approaches and enters the dark entrance of a covered wooden passage structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through the lower village passing tribal NPCs and colorful decorated huts while heading toward a covered stairway

notable_agents.action: tribal warrior standing guard near a thatched hut entrance wearing blue garments
villager walking up the wooden path ahead toward the covered passage

entered.detail: rustic hut with straw roof and wooden supports decorated with hanging fabrics
red and blue fabric banners and triangular flags hanging from wooden poles
dark tunnel-like entrance to a covered wooden stairway leading upward

segments.scene_description: Moving inland from the coast, the character enters the lower village area populated by tribal NPCs and rustic thatched huts. Colorful banners and decorations line the path as the rain continues. The character passes a standing guard and approaches the dark entrance of a covered wooden passage that leads upward through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden stairway tunnel ascending through the settlement

events.description: enters the dark covered wooden passage, lighting shifts dramatically to dim interior
approaches the exit of the tunnel, natural light increases at the far end

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs through the enclosed passage with rough timber walls

notable_agents.action: villager climbing the stairs ahead of the player character

entered.detail: enclosed walkway made of rough wooden planks and thick timber beams
thick vertical logs supporting the roof of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed wooden passage that serves as a stairway ascending through the settlement. The lighting shifts to a dim interior atmosphere with rough timber beams and planks surrounding the path. A villager walks ahead up the stairs as the character climbs toward the light visible at the tunnel's exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper village tier with elevated wooden walkways and mossy stairs

events.description: exits the covered tunnel into the upper level of the tribal settlement with open sky visible

agents.ego_description: continuing to ascend through the upper village area with more elaborate wooden structures and mossy pathways

notable_agents.action: villager walking up the mossy stairs in the distance

entered.detail: complex multi-level wooden buildings with platforms and bridges
weathered wooden steps covered in green moss and vegetation

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered passage, the character enters the upper tier of the settlement where the wooden architecture becomes more elaborate with multi-level structures. The rain continues to fall on the moss-covered wooden stairs as the character ascends further, with misty mountains becoming visible again in the left background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked tribal settlement, transitioning from an open coastal entrance to the enclosed heights of the upper village. It begins with Aloy walking past a massive water wheel and carved totems under a light rain, moving through a misty atmosphere framed by colorful spiked barriers. As the character emerges onto an open boardwalk, the scene expands to reveal a vibrant turquoise ocean with waves crashing against rocks before turning inland toward a cluster of thatched huts and tribal guards. The camera then follows the character into the dim, enclosed interior of a wooden stairway, where the lighting shifts to a moody atmosphere of rough timber beams. Finally, the shot emerges from the dark passage into the upper tier of the settlement, ascending moss-covered stairs amidst elaborate multi-level architecture with misty mountains reappearing in the distance.
